name: Calamari
author: Poki
description: See if you can get the highest score in Calamari! In this arcade game made by Nitrome, you'll have to get as many coins as possible to get the highest score. You'll have to jump around and shoot blocks out of the way to get to the coins, but be careful! If you get stuck under a block, it's game over. Got a friend around? Then you can play together! See who's the top scorer! How to play Calamari? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move around! Use spacebar to shoot! Who created Calamari? Calamari was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki!: Double Edged , bad-ice-creamr and Twin Shot How can I play Calamari for free? You can play Calamari for free on Poki. Can I play Calamari with my friend? Yes! Calamari is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
